engineerToolbox.summary: Chen's Engineer Toolbox — Python/Streamlit/FastAPI web app for facility and pipeline engineering. Skills and rules embedded for AI-assisted development.
dataloaderCMLs: TML Data Loader: 20 workflows for batch processing TML design parameters (Status, AER Flag, Code Year, Design Code, Material, OD, NPS, Schedule, Pressure, Tnom, Tmin, etc.); Source_Data + template; AER_Status_CML filter
De-active CML: Generate dataloader to deactivate all CMLs in source sheet; flexible column aliases; Status Indicator = Inactive

Inspection Report Loader: Parse UT inspection PDFs (pdfplumber, OCR fallback, optional LLM Vision) → Read summaries or generate APM Measurements dataloader; optional Source Excel for Circuit→Equipment ID mapping
b31g: Modified B31G methodology (ASME B31G-2009) for pipeline metal loss assessment
Failure pressure (Pf) and Folias factor; methods: b31g, mb31g, ng18, rstreng, lpc1, shell92
Metal Loss Assessment (single feature) and Metal Loss Mass Assessment (bulk, 10-year corrosion growth projection)
Depth/length tolerances, z ≤ 50 and z > 50 handling; dimp/tp > 0.80 → >80% leak
pipelineVisual: ILI Visual Tool: Upload Excel or paste tabular data → chainage vs depth scatter; Viridis color scale; feature boxes by length/width
Dig Package: Parse Excel feature summary + joint summary; longseam orientation per joint; column mapping for distance, depth, length, width, orientation
inspectionReportParser: Acuren table parsing, zone-based CML IDs, OCR/LLM Vision fallback
